lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows noticeable signs of wear and has some minor mechanical and cosmetic issues that may require attention. The car remains functional for regular use.
The car is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear consistent with regular use. The interior is clean and well-maintained. All mechanical systems are in good working order.

Check out this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for, making it a reliable and stylish choice for its next owner. It runs smoothly and looks great, with only some minor signs of cosmetic wear that you would expect from a regularly driven car. It's a solid, dependable ride that is ready to hit the road today!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major restoration project. The engine suffers from a persistent, loud knock and frequent misfires, indicating significant internal wear and the likely need for a full rebuild. Additionally, the transmission slips frequently, making the car unreliable for regular driving. The body shows visible rust and the interior requires deep cleaning and repair. This is a project car that will likely need to be towed from the lot.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly a collector-grade example that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its deep factory shine with no chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the leather upholstery is supple and free of wear, the carpets are spotless, and all electronic features function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a smooth, powerful engine and a transmission that shifts seamlessly. It has been meticulously garaged and maintained with a full service history. A buyer can expect a vehicle that requires zero immediate investment and offers the experience of a brand-new car.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained to ensure mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience and a well-preserved aesthetic. A premier selection for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber automobile that has been handled with professional care and attention to detail.

Hey there! I’m looking for a new home for my reliable ride. It’s been so well-loved and taken care of, making it a perfect companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. It runs beautifully and is in great shape for its next adventure! I’m really going to miss this car, but I’m excited for someone else to get behind the wheel and enjoy it as much as I have.

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain remains robust with documented rod bearing and throttle actuator service. The chassis retains its composure via the M Variable Differential Lock and EDC-equipped damping. Finished in Interlagos Blue, the exterior shows minor stone chipping consistent with road use, while the interior retains its structural integrity. Performance is anchored by four-wheel ventilated, cross-drilled rotors and staggered alloy wheels. A mechanically sound driver’s example for the purist.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Reliable performance. Clean title.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and performance. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only the minor, expected signs of road use consistent with a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the premium leather upholstery has been regularly conditioned and remains supple, while the dashboard and trim are free of cracks or fading. Every electronic component, from the intuitive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and a recent full synthetic oil change. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining for the seasons ahead. This is a reliable, turn-key car ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a refined driving experience and proven mechanical integrity. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and aesthetic appeal. The cabin remains sophisticated and clean, complemented by a robust powertrain that delivers consistent reliability. For the professional seeking a dependable yet distinguished automobile, this selection represents an outstanding acquisition opportunity.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a seamless blend of performance and reliability. Every component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and long-term utility. An exemplary choice for those seeking a sophisticated driving experience and proven durability.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily errands and weekend trips. It runs smoothly and is ready for a new home where it’ll be just as appreciated. If you’re looking for a dependable ride that still looks great on the road, this is the one for you! Let’s get you behind the wheel!
Used car. Condition: good.
Reliable daily driver. Well-maintained engine. Minor cosmetic wear. Clean title. Service records included.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a premium driving experience with a focus on longevity and care. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like finish, though minor stone chips on the hood reflect its honest history as a cherished daily driver. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, smoke-free environment featuring supple leather upholstery with only minimal creasing on the driver’s side bolster. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the responsive touchscreen navigation, functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine is clean and performs smoothly, backed by a complete portfolio of service records highlighting recent fluid changes and a fresh set of performance tires. It is a mechanically sound, aesthetically pleasing car that bridges the gap between luxury and practicality perfectly.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and displaying consistent mechanical integrity, this unit offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Its condition reflects a history of diligent care, ensuring both aesthetic appeal and long-term reliability. A premier selection for those who demand excellence without compromise.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and an exceptional service history, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with enduring value. We invite you to inspect this distinguished example of automotive engineering, which stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains in commendable condition throughout.

Hey there! I’m super excited to list my trusty ride. It’s in really solid shape and has been such a reliable companion for me. It’s been well-cared for and is totally ready for its next adventure with you! If you're looking for a dependable car that still has tons of life in it, this is the one. Feel free to reach out—I'd love to see it go to a great home!

This 2011 Porsche Cayman S is a masterclass in balance, powered by a 3.4L DFI flat-six that provides immediate throttle response and a soulful exhaust note. The mid-ship architecture minimizes polar moment of inertia, while the communicative hydraulic steering rack ensures surgical precision through every apex. Mechanically sound, the vehicle features a robust transaxle and a suspension geometry optimized for both lateral grip and high-speed stability. Recent service records confirm the health of the cooling system and brake hydraulics, making this an ideal specimen for the discerning driver who values mechanical transparency and chassis dynamics.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean interior. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle is the ideal choice for a driver seeking a balance of performance and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, complemented by clean alloy wheels and tires with excellent tread remaining. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment featuring supple leather seating with only minimal signs of use, a fully functional infotainment suite, and ice-cold dual-zone climate control. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a comprehensive file of maintenance records included. It starts effortlessly, shifts smoothly, and offers a quiet, composed ride. This is a well-cared-for example that is ready for its next chapter without the need for immediate investment.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a well-maintained vehicle of distinguished pedigree. This automobile exhibits a superior level of care, balancing mechanical excellence with a refined aesthetic profile. It serves as a testament to consistent stewardship, offering the reliability and performance standards expected of a premier pre-owned selection. Meticulously vetted to ensure lasting value, this vehicle remains a sophisticated choice for the discerning driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and an impressive aesthetic presence, this unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure continued reliability. It stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership, offering a sophisticated driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's been super well-loved? I'm parting with my trusty car, and it's in really solid shape and ready for its next adventure! It runs like a dream and has been kept up nicely over the years. Perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend road trips. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

Used car for sale. Good condition. Clean title. Well maintained.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and everyday practicality. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, accented by clean body lines and only the minor cosmetic markers of careful, regular use. Inside, the cabin is a testament to pride of ownership, featuring supple upholstery, a pristine dashboard, and electronics that remain fully functional.
